0_Overview: Mobile Development Landscape: Native, Cross-platform, Hybrid, PWA
Native iOS: Swift + SwiftUI/UIKit — Best Performance, Apple Ecosystem
Native Android: Kotlin + Jetpack Compose/XML — Best Performance, Google Ecosystem
Cross-platform: React Native (JavaScript), Flutter (Dart), Xamarin (.NET)
React Native: Write Once, Run on iOS and Android with JavaScript/TypeScript
Flutter: Write Once, Run Everywhere with Dart — Pixel-perfect UI
Hybrid Apps: Capacitor/Ionic — Web Tech Wrapped in Native Shell
PWA: Progressive Web Apps — Web Apps with Native-like Features
When to Go Native: Performance-critical, Platform-specific Features
When to Go Cross-platform: Faster Development, Shared Codebase, Smaller Team
Mobile App Architecture: MVC, MVP, MVVM, Clean Architecture
State Management on Mobile: Redux, Zustand (RN), BLoC, Provider (Flutter)
Navigation: React Navigation (RN), Navigator (Flutter)
Local Storage: AsyncStorage, MMKV, SQLite, Realm
Push Notifications: FCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging), APNs
App Store Deployment: Apple App Store, Google Play Store
Over-the-Air Updates: Expo EAS Update, CodePush
Mobile Performance: JS Thread vs UI Thread, Hermes Engine, Reanimated
Deep Linking and Universal Links
Mobile Security: Certificate Pinning, Biometrics, Secure Storage
